results.title: Critchall urges players to shape up after opening pre-season defeat
results.description: PORTLAND United manager Kyle Critchall urges players to improve fitness after a 2-0 defeat to Wimborne in the club's first pre-season game of the new campaign.

results.title: Spain's win over Portugal at Dallas Stadium showcases new generation of players

results.title: De la Fuente sings Lamine’s praises as Spain reaches World Cup quarterfinals
results.description: Against Portugal, Yamal had three attempts on goal, including ​two on target, helping Spain maintain the pressure before Merino’s late winner.

results.title: Sanchez allows career-worst 9 ER in Phillies' loss
results.description: Philadelphia ace Cristopher Sanchez allowed a career-worst nine earned runs in just 3 1/3 innings in the Phillies' surprising 15-1 loss to Kansas City on Monday afternoon, telling reporters that the Royals "made me pay, and you just have to keep going."

results.title: After his ban was controversially lifted, Balogun had little impact in U.S. World Cup loss
results.description: United States’ Folarin Balogun goes for the ball during the World Cup round of 16 soccer match against Belgium in Seattle, Monday, July 6, 2026.
